responsibilities: Select the smallest lens set that covers the target plan's risk.
Create and maintain review ledger state.
Spawn or otherwise run independent lens reviewers with fresh context.
Ensure reviewer outputs are captured, terminal, and closed.
Hand completed outputs to the synthesis owner.
Archive final review artifacts when the review is complete.
validation_rules: Every selected lens must map to a manifest in registry.json.
Every active reviewer must report the current target_revision.
Completed spawned reviewers must have output_captured=true and closed=true.
